Video.summary: Several stolen wigs and one wrecked car have a Mississippi couple standing before the judges.
Video.title: Merriweather vs. Kimmons

Video.summary: A Georgia couple clashes in court over an ultimatum to marry or move on.
Video.title: Billingsley vs. Perrilloux

Video.summary: Felicia is done playing sugar mama for her younger boyfriend, Tyler: she wants the money she's owed for his repossessed truck.
Video.title: Mallett vs. Silas

Video.summary: After her boyfriend, Barry, takes a suspicious "business trip" to Miami, Brooke suspects him of cheating with his ex.
Video.title: Daniels vs. White

Video.summary: Ebony challenges Malik's loyalty with a lie detector, testing both his promise and their future in this high-stakes case.
Video.title: Peek vs. Sharpe

Video.summary: Alexus seeks vindication because hometown rumors have her boyfriend, Kristopher, questioning the paternity of their child.
Video.title: Davis-Jones vs. Martin

Video.summary: Shaylen petitions her boyfriend, Quan, to take a polygraph test because she suspects he's cheating with his ex.
Video.title: Thomas vs. Hudson

Video.summary: Married couple Jovan and Rosalyn feud over a shredded sofa, a broken TV and a dead plant.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Johnson

Video.summary: Danette & Matthew sleep alone at night because they live in different states. The Cutlers help them decide where to call home.
Video.title: Mahabeer vs. Turner

Video.summary: A grieving grandmother demands a paternity test to uncover the truth about her late son's mysterious child.
Video.title: Moultry vs. Portuonio

Video.summary: Chanel is suing her ex for a gift and emotional distress after finding out he's been texting other women.
Video.title: What Happened in Vegas?

Video.summary: A woman says her husband is failing to go the distance in their marriage.
Video.title: Covington vs. Covington

Video.summary: A polygraph test determines the fate of a rocky relationship when Bernard and Lexus both accuse the other of cheating.
Video.title: O'Neal vs Antrom

Video.summary: Sarah brings ex-boyfriend Richard to court for unpaid rent; he says she had an affair with the maintenance man.
Video.title: Frye vs. Hughes

Video.summary: High school sweethearts Darionna and Elijah seek help from the judges after getting a bitter taste of the struggles in marriage.
Video.title: Truell vs. Truell

Video.summary: A woman accuses her long-distance boyfriend of cheating.
Video.title: Matthews vs. Bryant

Video.summary: Sanela and Nic found their love is getting lost in the hustle and bustle of NYC and are seeking help from the Cutlers.
Video.title: Begani vs Crespo

Video.summary: Trust, betrayal and uncertainty collide as Faith demands proof and George fights for their relationship's survival.
Video.title: Payton vs. Payton

Video.summary: A woman sues her boyfriend after he tore her dress saying it was too revealing.
Video.title: Edmonds vs. Steele

Video.summary: With help from a substance abuse expert, the judges coach Nohariz and Eli through marital issues and alcohol abuse.
Video.title: Gonzalez vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: David is suing John after he was unable to get the car registered because he claims the title wasn't notarized.
Video.title: Car Sale Catastrophe

Video.summary: William and Marianne Lehman say they had a gas leak in their house and the defendant, a plumber, took terrible advantage of them and ripped them off. Brian says he was called out in an emergency situation to fix a gas leak on his off-hours, and explained his rates in detail to the plaintiffs. They agreed. Now a year later, they’re complaining and suing him? He’s accused of being a real pain the the gas.
Video.title: Pain in the Gas

Video.summary: Natheefa sues her brother Clifford, accusing him of stealing her 55" TV and owing $4,750 in rent after abruptly moving out. Clifford claims he left due to household tensions and took his own belongings.
Video.title: My Brother Stole My TV

Video.summary: Alexandria Pham claims Christy Lynn Gibel ran a red light while texting, crashed into her car, and lacks valid insurance. Christy denies fault, arguing Alexandria caused the crash. Now, Alexandria is suing for $3,575.61 in damages.
Video.title: Little Women: LA Star in Court!

Image.alt: Little Women: LA Star in Court!
Little Women: LA Star in Court!
Little Women: LA Star in Court!

Video.summary: Charles Louis sues Carnel Scott for $1,359, claiming he was evicted from an illegal rooming house with 13 residents, including criminals and drug users. Carnel defends his legal operation, accusing Charles of being disruptive and violent.
Video.title: Sketchy Rental Situation

Video.summary: Aisha claims Antwan harassed her and posted an explicit photo of her on social media without her permission.
Video.title: A Scantily Clad Suit

Video.summary: A woman says her former roommate moved out after three months because he wanted more from their relationship than she was willing to give, and she sues him for unpaid rent.
Video.title: Unrequited Rent

Video.summary: Nelson is here to sue his sister who has battled a heroin addiction for two unpaid loans.
Video.title: Seeking Treatment for Heroin

Video.summary: Derek is suing for breach of contract after claiming the female dancers he ordered were on their phones.
Video.title: Dance Party Full of Missteps

Video.summary: Kentra wants a paternity test after the man who signed her birth certificate has been in and out of her life.
Video.title: Believing the Birth Certificate

Video.summary: A woman sues a tattoo artist, claiming his shoddy work gave her an infection; she's suing for medical expenses, lost wages and pain and suffering.
Video.title: Beauty Is Skin Deep

Video.summary: Sara is suing her ex-boyfriend for breach of contract after he let his female friend move in with him.
Video.title: Stripped Bare

Video.summary: Giselle is suing her father for Emotional Distress and $145,000 for the cost of canceling her wedding.
Video.title: Daddy Dearest

Video.summary: Miguel is suing his ex-girlfriend for the entire $5 million which she won via a scratch-off ticket.
Video.title: Tickets to lies

Video.summary: Evelyn sues Dexter for $500K, saying he tricked her into leaving her marriage, causing financial ruin and distress. Dexter denies, saying she pursued him as a gold digger.
Video.title: For Love or Money

Video.summary: Barbara sues Emilio's strip club for $30,000, alleging negligence and emotional distress. She claims whiplash from Jackson's performance and a collapsing chair. Emilio denies responsibility, citing safety and Barbara's drinking.
Video.title: Tornado Tassel

Video.summary: The Wilsons sue Sean Moore, Ballpark Bandits sponsor, for $10,000. Their son got fired mid-season, Sean blames Kevin's erratic behavior and Laurie for fostering negativity and intimidating parents.
Video.title: Little League, Big Problems

Video.summary: Daniel sues Jeremy for $800,000, alleging copyright infringement over "Nightshade Ninja" costume copied as "Shadow Shogun." Jeremy denies, claims originality, forgives Daniel for reputation damage.
Video.title: The Hero-Con

Video.summary: Alexa is suing her boyfriend for abruptly canceling a trip of a lifetime because she needed to bring her kid.
Video.title: Adults only

Video.summary: Ariana Garcia, 19, is suing her parents for refusal to acknowledge and respect her privacy and boundaries.
Video.title: Baby Blues

Video.summary: Jonah sues ex-friend Elliot for $25,000, defamation, and IP theft, aiming to disband "The Wizarding Warband." Elliot disputes, blaming Jonah's leadership for league decline.
Video.title: Battle Royale

Video.summary: Guillermo Logan sues Nancy Grant for $5M, alleging false imprisonment and mental anguish after getting trapped by her security system during a burglary. Nancy defends her system due to past burglaries and questions Guillermo's criminal history.
Video.title: Caught in the Act

Video.summary: Erica Green is suing her ex-trainer Susan White for emotional distress and fraud, seeking $15,000. Erica reached her goal weight in 2019 but gained 30 pounds during Covid. She signed up for Susan's "Waist Away" program with a weight loss guarantee but gained 25 pounds. Susan blames Erica's non-commitment and countersues for defamation, seeking $25,000. Erica's current trainer, Mark, regrets taking her as a client, as she fired him and he witnessed her unhealthy eating habits.
Video.title: Waisting Away

Video.summary: Chris sues ex-wife Lisa for $10K, citing emotional distress and property damage. He says Lisa punctured his emotional support doll, "Dolly." Lisa denies it, blaming Chris's objectophilia and claiming Dolly deflated when he sat on it.
Video.title: Deflated Love

Video.summary: Forty-six-year-old Jennifer Lozada is suing her husband and his mistress for alienation of affection.
Video.title: Alienated Whistleblower

Video.summary: Guadalupe is suing Thomas, the owner of a Quinceanera dress shop, for pain and suffering, and the dress.
Video.title: Franken-dress

Video.summary: Gabriella is suing her former employer for $600,000 for mental anguish and wrongful termination.
Video.title: Anniversary Blowout
